message:
feat(fp-frame): add select_dtypes string-alias parity (frankenpandas-sa33)

Adds DataFrame::select_dtypes_by_name matching pandas'
select_dtypes(include=..., exclude=...) string-alias form. Recognizes
pandas aliases (number/numeric, integer/int/int64/i8, floating/float/
float64/f8, bool/boolean/?, object/string/str/O, timedelta/timedelta64/
m8), rejects unknown aliases with a TypeError-equivalent
CompatibilityRejected, and rejects include/exclude overlap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
